summary: This page introduces the subsection on sketching an exponentially varying sinusoid of the form Ae^{-at}cos(ω0 t + θ). It begins a worked example for f(t)=4e^{-2t}cos(6t-60°), explaining that the exponential and cosine parts will be sketched separately before being combined, and starts with the decaying exponential 4e^{-2t}.

figures.caption: Fig. B.11 Sketching an exponentially varying sinusoid
